description: CarGurus is an automotive marketplace for researching, buying, and selling vehicles, with listings, dealer information, reviews, and pricing tools. It also provides dealer- and partner-oriented integration endpoints for inventory stats, messaging, search widgets, and website metrics.
summary: CarGurus exposes a public MCP server, a public Car Selector HTTP API, a dealer/SEM developer API family documented under /Cars/developers that generally uses CarGurus-issued appId + authToken, a Partner Metrics HTTP surface keyed by dealer access key, and a public CWV data API with an OpenAPI spec.

surfaces.name: CarGurus Core Web Vitals Data API
